title: poa cheelii
intro: Poa cheelii, also known as Cheeseman's blue grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Australia and New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Poa cheelii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and provide antioxidant protection, and it can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures.
